summary: The diff modifies InvoicePrintView.tsx and SimpleLoginScreen.tsx. All three requirements appear to be addressed: REQ-75 (remove Amount Paid/Pending from invoice), REQ-76 (improve invoice visual design), and REQ-77 (redesign login screen). The file summaries explicitly confirm 'Amount Paid' and 'Pending Amount' sections are removed, only Final Amount shown, and the login screen has been redesigned with MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH branding, card layout, and red brand colors. Authentication logic is preserved via the existing useSimpleAuth hook.
